description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa upholstered in a blue and white checkered fabric, giving it a distinctive and inviting appearance. The sofa features a single, continuous seat and back cushion, both seamlessly integrated into the frame for a streamlined look. Its armrests are rounded and padded, curving outward in a gentle arc that adds a touch of retro flair. The sofa is supported by four slender, black metal legs, slightly angled for stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The backrest is high and straight, providing ample support, while the overall silhouette is boxy yet softened by the rounded arms. The upholstery pattern is uniform across all surfaces, contributing to a cohesive and visually appealing design.
description: A modern, blue and white checkered sofa with rounded armrests, a single integrated cushion, and slender black metal legs. The design is compact, with a high straight backrest and a cohesive patterned upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, high straight backrest, and rounded armrests with the checkered upholstery clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the outward curve of the armrest and the depth of the seat, as well as the slender black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform checkered pattern, with the legs visible at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, mirroring the armrest curve and seat depth, with the same leg and upholstery details.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushion, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and outwardly curved armrests, padded and at seat height, with a smooth, seamless profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs, slightly angled outward, positioned at the corners, with an exposed and minimalist design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest integrated with the seat, no segmentation or tufting, providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Uniform blue and white checkered pattern, smooth fabric with no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
